Strengths & Impact

What I'm known for

Turning drop-off into growth

I identify where users disengage and design solutions that improve conversion and retention.

Aligning teams around the right problems

I bring product, engineering, and design together to focus on solutions that drive real impact.

Building systems, not just features

From onboarding frameworks to design systems, I create scalable solutions that extend across the product.

As a lead designer on the growth team at Step, I've driven initiatives that shaped product strategy — not just execution. From challenging assumptions about signup friction to introducing new onboarding systems, I focus on aligning teams around solutions that deliver real results.

Process

Using AI to move faster and design better

I use AI as a tool to accelerate my design process, freeing up more time to focus on product strategy, user needs, and high-impact decisions.

In my workflow, AI helps me:

  • Quickly explore multiple design directions and ideas
  • Synthesize research and identify patterns faster
  • Prototype and iterate on flows more efficiently
  • Generate and refine content when needed

I treat AI as a tool, not a source of truth. Every output is shaped by product context, user needs, and design judgment.
